---
title: "Handling COVID Years in Open Road Risk"
description: "Placeholder notes on how COVID-era traffic and collision anomalies are handled in cleaning, features, modelling, and interpretation."
---

## Overview

COVID years affect both traffic volumes and collision counts. This page will
explain how 2020 and 2021 are handled in cleaning, feature engineering, and
model interpretation.

::: {.callout-note}
Placeholder page.
:::

## Planned Content

- Why COVID years are flagged.
- Which models include or exclude COVID years.
- Sensitivity checks for temporal trends.
- Interpretation cautions for 2020-2021.
